name: #コンパス【戦闘摂理解析システム】

detail.description:
A new experience where you can easily enjoy 3on3 online battles. 

Control a hero running around a 3D field, fight together with your friends, and aim for victory! 

Grow the heroes and cards that appear in the game, and
build your own deck! 

■Gorgeous creators and popular voice actors participate■

#Compass [Battle providence analysis system] is
Vocaloid P, an artist who is active in Nico Nico Douga
Produce heroes! 
In addition, a popular voice actor will be in charge of the hero's voice. 

■A

・軽微な不具合を修正
